description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the quay.io/python-devs/ci-image Docker image and three stages: test, codecov, and deploy. In the test stage define a tests job that runs `tox -e py27,py35,py36,py37,py38,py39`; also define a Windows tests job (tagged windows) that first enables Chocolatey global confirmation, installs Python 3.8.6, 3.7.6, 3.6.8, 3.5.4.20200110 and Python 2 via Chocolatey, creates a symlink to C:\Python, prepends C:\Python;C:\Python\Scripts to PATH, upgrades pip, installs tox, then runs the same tox environments as the tests job; additionally add diffcov, docs, and qa jobs that run `tox -e py27-diffcov,py35-diffcov,py36-diffcov,py37-diffcov,py38-diffcov,py39-diffcov`, `tox -e docs`, and `tox -e qa` respectively. Add a coverage job in the test stage that runs `tox -e py27-cov,py35-cov,py36-cov,py37-cov,py38-cov,py39-cov` and publishes the generated coverage.xml as an artifact. In the codecov stage add a codecov job that depends on the coverage job, runs `codecov --token $CODECOV_TOKEN` on success. In the deploy stage add a release job that runs only on tags matching the regex /^v\d+\.\d+(\.\d+)?([abc]\d*)?$/ and executes `tox -e release`.
